field.expiredAt.description: The expiration time of the application.

button.goDocument.description: Button text that navigates to the document page when clicked.

button.goCredentials.description: Button text that navigates to the credentials page when clicked. Must translate to 'Keys'.

button.buyMore.description: Button text that navigates to the purchase more page when clicked. Must translate to 'Top Up'.

button.createOrder.description: Button text that navigates to the create order page when clicked.

button.custom.description: Button text that navigates to the custom page when clicked.

button.query.description: Button text that navigates to the query page when clicked.

button.usage.description: Button text that navigates to the usage history page when clicked. Must translate to 'Usage'.

field.id.description: The ID of the application. Must translate to 'App ID'.

field.remainingAmount.description: The balance of the application. Must translate to 'Balance'.

field.usedAmount.description: The amount used in the application. Must translate to 'Used'.

field.allowConsumeGlobal.description: Switch to allow consumption of general balance.

field.scope.description: The scope of the application, which may be global or specific to a service.

field.traceId.description: The trace ID of the API call for the application.

field.shouldPayPrice.description: The final price of the application.

field.api.description: This is an online service that provides services to users through an API.

field.proxy.description: This is an online service that provides services to users through an HTTP proxy (for data transmission).

field.package.description: The package represents different pricing packages, such as $100 for 10,000 points, $200 for 20,000 points.

field.extraPrice.description: The additional price the user should pay for the application.

message.alreadyApplied.message: You have already applied for this service, please check the console.
message.alreadyApplied.description: Message displayed to the user when they have already applied for this service.

message.applySuccessfully.description: Message displayed to the user when they successfully apply for this service.

message.applyFailed.message: Failed to activate the free trial, please refresh the page and try again.
message.applyFailed.description: Prompt displayed when the automatic creation of a global application fails.

message.welcomeWithCredits.message: 🎉 Welcome to Nexior! We have credited you with {credits} points, which can be used across all services.
message.welcomeWithCredits.description: Welcome prompt displayed after successful creation of a global application or upon first entry. {credits} is the remaining quota of the global application.

message.welcomeNoCredits.message: 🎉 Welcome to Nexior! Your account is ready to experience any service across the platform.
message.welcomeNoCredits.description: Welcome prompt displayed when there are no available free credits for the global application.

message.notApplied.message: You have not applied for this service yet, please apply for the service before use.
message.notApplied.description: Message displayed to the user when they have not applied for this service.

message.globalBalanceBuyDescription.message: You can choose to recharge to the General Balance or recharge each application instance separately. This recharge will go into the General Balance, and when the balance of a specific application instance is insufficient, it will automatically use the General Balance to supplement.
message.globalBalanceBuyDescription.description: Prompt text explaining that the recharge goes into the General Balance and automatically supplements when the instance balance is insufficient. Term: General Balance.

message.yourApplication.description: Message displayed to the user when their application is shown.

message.unverified.message: You need to complete identity verification before applying for this service.
message.unverified.description: Message displayed to the user when they have not completed identity verification.

message.goVerify.description: Message displayed to the user when they have not completed identity verification.

message.requiredParameter.description: Message displayed to the user when they have not entered a required parameter.

message.example.description: Message displayed to the user when they have not entered a required parameter.

message.applicationSelection.message: Here are the packages you currently applied for or purchased. You can choose one to continue using the service.
message.applicationSelection.description: Message displayed to the user when they need to select an application.

message.createCredentialSuccessfully.description: Message displayed to the user when they successfully create credentials.

message.readPolicy.description: Message displayed to the user when they have read and agreed to the policy.

message.policy.description: Message displayed to the user when they have read and agreed to the policy.

message.notAgreePolicy.message: You have not agreed to the Data Technology Service Usage Agreement.
message.notAgreePolicy.description: Message displayed to the user when they have not agreed to the policy.

message.welcome.description: Message displayed to the user when they confirm the service application.

message.rotateCredential.description: Message displayed to the user when they reset the key.

message.rotateCredentialConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to reset the key? It cannot be recovered after resetting.
message.rotateCredentialConfirm.description: Message displayed to the user when they confirm the key reset.

message.idDoesNotExist.description: Message displayed to the user when the application does not exist.

message.rotateCredentialSuccessfully.description: Message displayed to the user when the key reset is successful.

message.rotateCredentialFailed.message: Key Reset Failed, please contact support.
message.rotateCredentialFailed.description: Message displayed to the user when the key reset fails.

message.fetchFailed.message: Failed to fetch applications, please try again later.
message.fetchFailed.description: Prompt when fetching the application list fails.

message.updateFailed.description: Message displayed to the user when the update fails.

message.updateSuccessfully.description: Message displayed to the user when the update is successful.

message.neverExpire.description: Message displayed to the user when the application never expires.

title.buyService.description: Title of the page when the user wants to purchase a service.

title.globalBuy.message: Ace Data Cloud General Points Recharge
title.globalBuy.description: Title of the page when the user wants to purchase general services.

title.applicationRemainingCount.description: Title of the page when the user wants to modify the application count.

title.manageApplication.description: Title of the page when the user wants to manage applications.

title.applicationBalance.description: Message displayed to the user when viewing the application balance.

title.count.description: Title of the page when the user views the application count.

message.countDescription.message: Each service corresponds to an application instance, and you can view keys, usage, and other information in the management section below.
message.countDescription.description: Message displayed to the user when viewing the application count.

title.globalBalance.description: Title of the page when the user views the general balance.

message.globalBalanceDescription.message: Enabling 'Allow General Balance' will automatically use general balance when instance balance is insufficient.
message.globalBalanceDescription.description: Prompt text explaining that general balance will be consumed automatically when instance balance is insufficient.

button.service.description: Button text that redirects to the support page.

button.delete.description: Button text, click this button to delete the item.

message.addServiceToAcquire.description: Message shown to the user when support has not yet been added to acquire the service (English suggestion: Add support to acquire).

message.confirmApplying.description: Message shown to the user when confirming a service request.

message.confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this request? All request data will be lost after deletion.
message.confirmDelete.description: Message shown to the user when confirming deletion of a request.

message.placeEnter.description: Message shown when the user needs to enter text for confirmation. Do not translate `$0$`.

message.invalidInput.description: Message shown to the user when invalid data is entered.

message.deleteFailed.description: Message shown to the user when deletion fails.

message.deleteSuccessfully.description: Message shown to the user when deletion succeeds.

title.description.description: Page title shown when the user views the Data Technology Service Usage Agreement.
